entries.name: Design tokens / CSS palette (:root)
entries.what: Single-color minimalist palette. --bg #fff, --ink #111, --ink-2 #555, --dim #8a8a8a, --faint #b5b5b5; lines --line #e7e7e7, --line-2 #ededec, --field #e2e2e2, --dash #d6d6d6; --hover #f7f7f7, --fill #f4f4f4. Block layout: --surface #f3f3f4 (page bg), --block #fff (cards), --block-sh: none (flat — shadows replaced by surface/block contrast). --canvas-bg #f7f7f6. Note colors --note #fbf6d2/--note-line #ece2a8/--note-ink #5c5320. Base font-size 14px. Fonts: Noto Sans SC + system stack; .mono = ui-monospace/SF Mono/Menlo. ::selection rgba(17,17,17,.1). Scrollbars 8px, thumb #e4e4e4 r4.
entries.portingNotes: Port verbatim as CSS variables / theme object — every component references these. CRITICAL: --block-sh is currently `none` (recently flattened) so cards read as white blocks on grey surface with NO resting shadow; hover states reintroduce explicit shadows (e.g. pcard hover 0 8px 26px rgba(17,17,17,.10)). Do NOT add resting shadows. Keep 14px root. Tailwind users must map these exactly; many inline styles also use var(--block-sh).

entries.name: Two-page shell + router
entries.what: SPA with exactly two top-level pages toggled by .page.on (display:none/flex). Route: /p/<id>/ => #page-project, anything else => #page-home. body is display:flex with #sidebar (fixed) + #main (flex:1, column). #main holds #update-bar (hidden), #page-home, #page-project. Page chosen at boot by IS_PROJECT; nav-proj always gets .on.
entries.portingNotes: In React this becomes a router (e.g. react-router) with two routes; PF_BASE prefix (`/p/<id>`) is prepended to ALL project-scoped API calls — preserve. Both pages share the persistent sidebar and update-bar OUTSIDE the page switch. Stage within project page is tracked in URL hash #s<id> (history.replaceState + hashchange listener 2427-2430).

entries.name: Left sidebar (#sidebar) — collapse 232<->64
entries.what: Fixed-width 232px sidebar on --surface, width transitions to 64px when body.collapsed (width .18s ease). Contains: .sb-head (logo block + collapse btn), .sb-nav (3 items: 项目/资产/设置), .sb-acct account card pinned bottom (margin-top:auto). Logo .mark = 34px ink square radius10 with white 'P' or chevron-expand SVG on hover when collapsed. Collapse button .sb-collapse only appears on #sidebar:hover (opacity 0->1); hidden when collapsed (logo doubles as expand). Nav items: padding 9px 11px, radius10, transparent default; hover/.on = --block bg + --block-sh, .on adds font-weight 600. Icons 20px box w/ 18px Lucide SVG, --dim default -> --ink on hover/active. Collapsed: labels (.name/.lbl/.meta) hidden, items centered.
entries.portingNotes: Collapse state is a body class (`collapsed`) — port as a top-level boolean controlling a CSS class or data attribute, since MANY descendant selectors key off `body.collapsed`. Logo click behavior is conditional: collapsed=expand (preventDefault on the <a href='/'>), expanded=navigate home. '资产'/'设置' nav items are stubs that just toast('…即将上线'). Account card shows version via #sb-ver (clickable -> checkUpdate, dotted underline).

entries.name: Topbar (.topbar) — both pages
entries.what: 60px fixed-height bar, padding 0 28px, on --surface. Home topbar: .ttl '总览' + right-aligned '＋ 新建项目' btn. Project topbar: .back '全部项目' (arrow), .ttl with #product (ellipsis-truncated product name), the .steps-bar stepper (flex:1), then .right with 💬留言 (#chat-btn, ghost sm), 📋全部产物 (openOverview), .meta #meta ('N/M 完成'), and #next-stage-btn '下一步 →' (hidden until rendered). At @media 1180px padding shrinks to 0 18px and .meta hidden.
entries.portingNotes: chat-btn carries .has-unread pseudo-element badge (red dot top-right) when unread messages exist and drawer closed. #product set by renderBoard from state.product. #meta computed from done/total phases. next-stage-btn visibility/label set in renderBoard (hidden on last phase).

entries.name: 7-stage stepper (#stepper / .steps-bar)
entries.what: Horizontal pill row, flex:1, horizontally scrollable (scrollbar hidden). Each .step-pill = .num circle (20px) + .lbl. Default num bg --fill / color --faint, lbl --dim. .done: num bg --fill color --ink (shows IC_CHECK check icon instead of number), lbl --ink-2. .sel (currently-viewed stage, DECOUPLED from done): bg --block + inset 0 0 0 1.5px --ink ring; .num becomes ink bg white text; .lbl ink + bold. .step-sep = 18px×1px --line line between pills. Built from state.phases; onclick=selectStage(id). Selected pill auto-scrollIntoView (inline:center).
entries.portingNotes: KEY visual: .sel state is independent of .done — the stage you are VIEWING is always ring-highlighted regardless of completion. A pill can be both done+sel. Number cell shows check SVG (IC_CHECK) when done, else (index+1). @media 1180px: pills collapse to number-only (gap 0, padding 6px, hide .lbl) EXCEPT the .sel pill which keeps its label (padding 6px 12px, gap 8px, lbl inline) for context. step-sep narrows to 8px.

entries.name: Home card wall (#page-home / #proj-grid)
entries.what: #home-scroll (overflow-y auto, padding 28px 36px 60px). Title .home-h1 (26px/900) + .home-sub. .grid = auto-fill minmax(280px,1fr) gap18. .pcard = --block radius16, cover image (150px object-fit cover) or .cover.ph placeholder (2.4rem 900 first-letter on --fill), .pbody with .pname (+inline badges), .pdir (mono, ellipsis), .segs (per-phase 5px progress bars: .seg/.seg.done(ink)/.seg.active(dim)), .pmeta 'N/7 阶段 · relTime'. Hover lifts (translateY -1 + shadow). .pcard-del trash btn top-right (opacity 0 -> 1 on hover). Badges: .badge-working '进行中' (ink pill), .hdot health (.hdot-d ok green #16a34a / bad red #dc2626 + online/offline + ms). .pcard.broken (opacity .6) for missing/error. Ghost cards (.pcard.ghost, --fill, 'CLI 待接单'). Archive section #arch-sec with toggle + #arch-grid. Empty: .home-empty.
entries.portingNotes: projCard uses inline onclick=location.href and event.stopPropagation for delete. Health/working flags conditional on p.health/p.working. Segs map phase.status to classes. relTime() helper for human times. Polls /api/projects every 3s. Archive open state is module var archOpen.

entries.name: View-board (#view-board) — panel stages 1,2,5,6,7
entries.what: Scroll container shown for non-canvas stages. Contains #health-line (hidden by default, populated by pollHealth: '线上 <dot> ms · 检查于 HH:MM'), then .wrap (max-width 1100, padding 24px 36px 36px) with <main> holding: #stage-extra (stage-specific injected HTML), then 3 .card blocks — '阶段步骤' (#phase-title + #steps list), '产物' gallery (#gallery), '进展日志' (#log). .card = --block radius12 padding 18/20, --block-sh. Steps list: .dot (9px) states none/.done(ink)/.active(dim+pulse anim)/.skipped(dash) + .st-title + mono step id right-aligned. Gallery = auto-fill minmax(150px,1fr); .art tiles (image 100px cover OR .ic doc-icon) + .cap. Log: last 60 rows reversed, ts(mono) + msg, max-height 280 scroll.
entries.portingNotes: #stage-extra content swapped by renderStageExtra() per selectedPhase (briefSectionHtml / refsPanelHtml / runStageHtml). renderBoard runs on EVERY poll — must NOT clobber focused inputs (guards check document.activeElement). phase-title hint shows 已完成/进行中/待开始 from phase.status. Gallery items open modal via openArtifact. health-line display toggled by data presence.

entries.name: Stage-extra: P1 Brief + Market Research
entries.what: Two cards injected into #stage-extra for stage 1. '产品需求' card: #st-brief textarea (.wz-textarea), summary box that switches between 4 states — ready (4 .wz-airow rows 产品目标/目标用户/核心需求/输出范围), running (.wz-aibox spinner text), failed (red-tinted aibox), idle (prompt). Optional clarify box with .wz-tag option chips (questions) + #st-clarify textarea. Action buttons vary: with-questions => 重新生成 + ✓确认; else single 生成摘要/重新生成 button. '市场调研' card: hint + optional redo-instruction input + run button (让/重新做市场调研) + running/failed aiboxes.
entries.portingNotes: Heavy local state object pBrief (description/summary/ready/generating/questions/answers/confirmed/failed). foldClarifications() folds picked answers + free text into description string with '问题澄清N' / '用户澄清N' markers — preserve this exact folding format (Agent parses it). Render is suppressed while user types in st-brief/st-clarify (focus guard). Tag chips toggle pBrief.answers via event delegation on #stage-extra. Tinted error/warn boxes use specific colors #e0b4b4/#fdf4f4/#b3403a and #f0e2c8/#fdfaf2/#9a6a1a.

entries.name: Stage-extra: P2 Find references (refsPanelHtml)
entries.what: '找参考' card in #stage-extra (stage 2). STAGE_TAGS style chips (.wz-tag, multi-select), 找参考 button, paste-link input #st-ref-url + 采集链接 button. Reference grid .wz-refgrid (column, one big image per row): .wz-ref cards full-width images (.rthumb img width100% height auto, true aspect), .rbar with caption + selected badge + actions (🔍放大 zoomRef, 🔗源 optional, ＋类似 moreLikeRef), .wz-check top-left + .wz-del top-right. Selected .wz-ref.on => inset ink ring + dark .rbar + white caption. Searching/empty/failed states use .wz-aibox. Hidden #refs-viewer div feeds Viewer.js for zoom/pan/paging.
entries.portingNotes: State pExplore (refs/selectedRefs/stylePrefs/searchFailed). Selecting refs/tags POSTs to /api/explore immediately (optimistic + persist). Uses external Viewer.js (viewer.min.js/css) — re-init on each render via initRefsViewer; refsViewerOpen flag suppresses re-render while zoomed (renderStageExtra guard line 1272). moreLikeRef seeds a refined search. Failed state detected from agent-log last line kind==='error' (pollSearchLog).

entries.name: Stage-extra: P5/P6/P7 run-stage (runStageHtml)
entries.what: Generic 'let Agent do this stage' card for stages 5/6/7. Title+hint per phase (names/hints maps), optional redo-instruction input (#st-stage-req when done), main run button (IC_SPARK + label), running/failed/waiting aiboxes. Phase 7 prepends deployCredsHtml card; phase 6 prepends previewSectionHtml + adds a platform-aware preview/run button (📱模拟器/🖥本地运行/🌐本地预览). Main button label on P7 varies by platform (APP=分发包, PC=部署上线, H5=部署上线). Also a 📂 reveal-code button (访达/资源管理器).
entries.portingNotes: pStageRun[phase] = {line,running,waiting,failed,instr}; running state from server (/api/agent-log?phase=stage-N, data.running/.waiting). waiting => amber-tinted box (#d8c98a/#fcf8e8/#7a6a1f) telling user Agent awaits their choice. Button labels depend on pfWizard.primary (loaded from /api/wizard). 409 from /api/run-stage => 'already running' toast (concurrency guard).

entries.name: Deploy-creds card (deployCredsHtml)
entries.what: P7-only card. 4-grid inputs (PF_SSH_HOST/USER/PORT/DEPLOY_TARGET) + #dc-extra textarea (KEY=VALUE lines). Stored list shows masked creds as pills (key=masked) with ✕ delete + 清空全部 btn. 💾保存凭证 button. Hint explains storage at ~/.productflow/secrets/ (600, not in git/inbox).
entries.portingNotes: State pDeployCreds {keys:[{key,masked}], draft}. Draft persisted in-memory via pdcDraft on input. saveDeployCreds parses extra lines with regex /^\s*([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*)\s*=\s*(.*)$/. Only non-empty fields sent; merges server-side. removeCred/clearCreds POST to /api/deploy-creds. clearCreds uses window.confirm.

entries.name: Infinite canvas (#view-canvas) — stages 3,4
entries.what: Full-area pannable/zoomable canvas, display:none unless canvas stage. background --canvas-bg + radial-gradient dotted grid (#e3e3e1 1px dots, 22px tile). cursor grab / grabbing(.panning). #cv-world is the transformed layer (translate(x,y) scale(z), transform-origin 0 0). Cards (.cv-item, 320px, radius14, shadow 0 2px 12px, hover deepens, .dragging deepens more). #cv-empty centered message when empty. #cv-stagebar top-center control band. .cv-hint bottom-left usage text. .cv-controls bottom-right (zoom +/-, fit, #cv-zoom % readout). cvDefaultView = {x:60,y:80,z:0.7}. Zoom clamp 0.08-3. Layout grid ITEM_W 320, CARD_GAP 44, GRID_COLS 4, ROW_GAP 500.
entries.portingNotes: Two separate canvases per stage (3 heroes, 4 pages), never mixed — enterCanvas flushes prior stage's layout before loading. Layout persisted per-stage to /api/canvas (debounced 600ms cvSave + flushCanvasSave on leave). Pan/drag/zoom all manual pointer-event math (no lib) — careful porting: drag delta divided by zoom; wheel zoom anchors at cursor (cvZoomAt). cvDragging/cvEditing flags suppress re-render mid-interaction. Auto-place new cards into grid (cvAutoPlaceCards). Selectors exclude interactive children from pan (textarea/.cv-base/.cv-del/.cv-plat/.cv-controls/#cv-stagebar/#hero-dialog). dblclick => openRedraw (edit layer). Many overlapping classes for cv-item variants — see page-card notes.

entries.name: Canvas stage bar (#cv-stagebar)
entries.what: Top-center floating band (white, radius12, shadow). Empty => display:none. P3: 生成首图 button (IC_SPARK) with three-state note (generating / failed-retry red / basis-summary), plus guide to go pick refs if none selected. P4: 让Agent列出页面 button + 批量生成全部(N页) + 整理排布 + 手动添加 buttons, with guide (set hero base first) + failed note. .sb-guide (dim, inline buttons) and .sb-sum (dim, ellipsis 360px) sub-styles.
entries.portingNotes: P3 generate state from pExplore.request['gen-heroes'] + heroGenFailed + heroes.length. P4 from pStageRun[4] + cv.pages.length + selectedHero. Buttons disabled (dash bg) while running. genAllPages carries a very long, exact instruction string to Agent (concurrency 20 image-gen guidance) — preserve verbatim, it's load-bearing. runPageMap also has an exact instruction string. tidyPages re-grids by group then name and cvFit.

entries.name: Hero cards & page cards (canvas items)
entries.what: Hero card (.cv-item, P3): image + .cv-del (✕ top-right hover) + .cv-base toggle ('设为基调'/'★ 基调', ink when base) + title bar. .cv-item.base => 2px ink ring, base button inverts. Page card (.cv-item.page-card, P4): 184px wide (300px if .plat-pc), .pthumb with REAL aspect-ratio (1080/2340 phone portrait, or 1440/1080 for PC), thumbnail or placeholder ('设计中…'/'待设计'), .cv-page-del (×), bar.col with .pn (status dot placeholder/designing/done + name + group) and .cv-platrow of .cv-plat badges (PC/H5/APP; .on=ink filled when version exists, else click-to-generate).
entries.portingNotes: Card aspect ratio follows the primary version's platform (PC=landscape). Platform matrix derived from pg.versions grouped by platform. Empty platform badge click => confirm() then POST gen-version; filled badge click => openArtifact preview. Hero base set via setHeroBase. data-* attributes (id/title/img/file/pgid) drive pointer handlers — keep them.

entries.name: Hero-generation dialog (#hero-dialog)
entries.what: P3-only right-docked panel (absolute top/right/bottom 12px, width 320, white radius14 shadow). .on shows it (only cvStage===3); .collapsed hides body+input (bottom:auto). .hd-head (title 生成首图 + collapse —). .hd-body: '本次参考' thumbnails (.hd-ref 46px, code label 图1/图2, checkbox toggle include/exclude via .hd-rck, .off => greyed) + hint, '生成记录' log (.hd-entry per gen with mode badge 生成/改图(blue), ts, ref/result counts, result thumbnails, prompt). .hd-input textarea #hd-text + 生成首图 button #hd-go (disabled+dash while generating).
entries.portingNotes: Reference codes 图N must stay in strict selectedRefs order (model --image order depends on it). insertRefCode inserts at cursor in textarea. heroRefOff{} tracks excluded refs (renumbers codes). dialogGenerate sends refFiles in code order + instruction to /api/explore gen-heroes. Result thumbs path artifacts/phase-3/heroes/. Collapsed state module var hdCollapsed. Edit-from-canvas (openRedraw stage 3) feeds baseImage back into gen-heroes here.

entries.name: Artifact modal (#modal) — image/markmap/text viewer
entries.what: Centered overlay (rgba(17,17,17,.32) backdrop). .box white radius16 max 960px, .box.wide for mindmaps (94vw × 88vh). .bar with #modal-title + ✕ 关闭. #modal-body content varies by type: image => img.full (max 78vh contain); html => window.open new tab (no modal); mindmap => #mm-svg rendered via markmap (lazy-loads d3/markmap-lib/markmap-view; grey palette #111-#999, autoFit, initialExpandLevel -1); text/md/json/code => <pre> escaped. Also hosts '全部产物' overview (openOverview): per-phase grid of image/doc/text cards aggregating brief+explore+pages+state artifacts.
entries.portingNotes: openOverview fetches brief/explore/pages in parallel and assembles a cross-stage gallery (_ovImgCard/_ovDocCard/_ovTextCard) — distinct from per-stage gallery; preserve aggregation logic and 'P{id} {name} · count' headers. Markmap needs the 3 vendor scripts loaded on demand (ensureMarkmap) — port as dynamic import. docIco() returns inline Lucide SVGs per type (md/html/code/json/mindmap). Esc closes modal+preview.

entries.name: Chat drawer (#chat-drawer)
entries.what: Right slide-in drawer (fixed, 372px / max 92vw, full height, shadow -10px 0 44px, z46, translateX(100%) -> 0 on .open). Holds a borderless .chat .card: header '给 Agent 留言' + 收起, #msgs message list, #chat-form (textarea #chat-input + 发送), note-txt footer. Messages (.msg.me ink right / .msg.agent fill left, 88% max, pre-wrap). Special message types render headers: canvas-feedback (📌 ❤N张·N条), preview-feedback (🖼 N处意见).
entries.portingNotes: Toggled from topbar #chat-btn. Unread tracking: lastMsgCount vs chatSeen; #chat-btn.has-unread red badge when new msgs arrive while closed. Auto-scroll only if near bottom (stick check). Enter sends / Shift+Enter newline. Polls /api/inbox every 4s. esc/scroll preservation matters.

entries.name: Choices bar (#choices-bar)
entries.what: Fixed top-center floating stack (top 64px, z35, width min(760, 100%-120)), display:none unless .show. Each .choice-card (warm #fffaf0, radius14, big shadow): .cq header '💬 Agent 在问你' + optional 阶段N, .cqt question text, .copts option chips (.copt white pills, hover => ink ring), .crow free-text #ci-<id> input + 回复 button.
entries.portingNotes: Shows only unanswered choices (answer==null) from /api/choices (poll 3s). Click chip or submit free text => answerChoice POST /api/choice + optimistic removal + toast. Render suppressed when an INPUT inside it is focused (don't interrupt typing). Click delegation on bar for .copt.

entries.name: New-project modal (#new-modal)
entries.what: Modal (.box max 640) for create. Body: 2-col name+slug inputs, then platform picker (platformPickerHtml): .wz-platforms 3-col cards (PC/H5/APP, .wz-pcard with device SVG icon, .wz-check tick, .on=block+shadow), 主平台 radio row (.wz-pr), 优先级 draggable list (.wz-prio-item, grip/idx/name/主平台 tag). Actions: 清空重填 / 取消 / 创建项目 →.
entries.portingNotes: Draft persisted to localStorage (pf-new-project-draft) — restored on open with toast. autoSlug() generates slug from name (中文 falls back to random fb id). Platform multi-select + primary fallback when primary deselected. Drag-reorder priority via native HTML5 DnD (dragstart/dragover splice). Event delegation on #new-body. createProject sorts priority (primary first), POST /api/create, redirect to /p/<id>/. deviceIcon() returns inline SVGs per platform.

entries.name: New-project wizard styles (.wz-*) — legacy/shared
entries.what: A full set of wizard styles (wz-h1/sub/sec/label/input/platforms/pcard/primary/prio/numstep/textarea/aibox/airow/substeps/actions/todo/tags/refgrid/ref/herogrid/hero/log). Most are reused by the in-stage panels (brief/refs use wz-textarea/wz-tag/wz-ref/wz-aibox/wz-airow) and by the new-project modal (wz-pcard/wz-pr/wz-prio). The standalone multi-step wizard page itself was removed (per comments 'create-now, do PRD/design inside stages').
entries.portingNotes: Don't build a separate wizard route — these classes survive only as the styling vocabulary for the create modal + stage panels. wz-log/wz-substeps may be unused (dead-ish) — flag, don't assume needed, but the progress-log/aibox patterns ARE used inline. Verify usage before dropping.

entries.name: Delete modal (#del-modal)
entries.what: Modal (.box max 500). Two tiers: (1) '从操作台移除' grey card — removes card only, keeps disk files; (2) '彻底删除（不可恢复）' red-bordered card (#fdf6f6 bg) requiring typing the exact project name into #del-confirm to enable the red 彻底删除 button. Button stays disabled/grey (--dash) until name matches.
entries.portingNotes: delTarget {id,name,dir}. syncDelConfirm gates the hard-delete button on exact name match (also re-checked in handler). removeProject => /api/project-remove; hardDeleteProject => /api/project-delete. Both pollProjects after. Confirm-by-typing pattern + button color transition (#c0392b enabled).

entries.name: Preview annotation overlay (#pv-overlay)
entries.what: Fullscreen dark overlay (rgba(18,18,18,.84), z90) for two modes: feedback (⑥ annotate finished screenshots) and redraw (③④ edit design via region/whole-image). .pv-head (title + action btn + ✕). .pv-stage holds #pv-img (max 90vw/74vh) + #pv-boxes (drawn .pv-box red rectangles with numbered .pvn label + .pvx delete) + #pv-draft (dashed live-draw rect). Optional shared #pv-instr textarea (.show only in redraw mode). .pv-hint footer. Drag to draw normalized (0-1) boxes via pointer events.
entries.portingNotes: pvState {mode,file,title,boxes,stage,pageId,platform}. Coordinates normalized 0-1 (resolution-independent, Agent maps to pixels). feedback mode: each box prompts for text immediately; redraw mode: boxes are selection-only, text in shared #pv-instr. Action button label flips by mode + box presence. sendPreviewFeedback builds a structured text string with percent coords + posts to /api/inbox (type preview-feedback) then offers confirm() to immediately re-run stage 6 with the feedback. redraw: boxes => /api/redraw regions (inpaint); no boxes + stage3 => gen-heroes baseImage; no boxes + stage4 => /api/redraw whole. Min box size 0.02. Preserve exact text-format strings (Agent-parsed).

entries.name: Update bar / version (#update-bar, #sb-ver)
entries.what: #update-bar: ink banner at top of #main (hidden until update available) — '🆕 有新版本 vX (当前 vY)' + 立即更新 button + #update-msg. #compat-banner: project-page warning (.compat-warn red box) shown when state.phases != 7 (legacy data). #sb-ver: sidebar version label, click => checkUpdate (shows 检查中/已是最新/🆕 vX).
entries.portingNotes: /api/update-check is a GLOBAL route (no /p/<id> prefix) — use absolute '/api/...'. Polls every 60s on both pages. doUpdate POSTs /api/update (git pull) and instructs restart. Compat banner lists the 7 stage names verbatim. update-bar shadows the home/project page switch (lives in #main above pages).

entries.name: Toast (#toast)
entries.what: Bottom-center pill (ink bg white text, fixed bottom 30px, fades opacity .25s, auto-hide 2.2s). Single global element reused for all transient messages.
entries.portingNotes: toast() is called everywhere as user feedback — port as a global toast context/portal. hideToast() called on stage switch to clear stale toasts. Single timer (toastTimer) cleared/reset per call.

screens.notes:
FILE: /Users/hong/.claude/skills/productflow/assets/console.html (2538 lines; CSS+HTML 1-704, JS 705-2538). Vendor deps: /vendor/viewer.min.css+js (Viewer.js for ref zoom), and on-demand /vendor/d3.min.js + markmap-lib.js + markmap-view.js (mindmap). ARCHITECTURE FOR THE REWRITE: - Single body.flex layout: persistent #sidebar + #main. #main contains update-bar + two mutually-exclusive .page divs. No real router lib — path-regex (/p//) decides page at boot; stage tracked in URL hash #s. - ALL project-scoped fetches are prefixed with PF_BASE (`/p/`); global routes (/api/projects, /api/version, /api/update-check, /api/update) are NOT prefixed. This split MUST be preserved in the React API layer. - Stage routing inside project: CANVAS_STAGES=[3,4] show #view-canvas; stages 1,2,5,6,7 show #view-board. selectStage() is the central switcher (also flushes canvas layout, updates hash, triggers per-stage polls). KEY VISUAL/STYLE FACTS TO PRESERVE PIXEL-FAITHFULLY: - Flat block aesthetic: --block-sh is currently `none`. Cards are white blocks on grey --surface; depth comes from surface/block contrast, NOT resting shadows. Shadows appear ONLY on hover/drag/floating panels (explicit values). Do not regress to bordered/shadowed cards. - Stepper .sel is decoupled from .done: the VIEWED stage always shows the inset ink ring + filled ink number; done stages show a check icon. A pill can be both. - Single-ink palette (no accent colors) except: status greens/reds (#16a34a/#dc2626), choice/brief warm yellows (#fffaf0/#fbf6d2/#9a6a1a), edit-mode blue (#5470c6), error reds (#c0392b/#b3403a/#fdf4f4), annotation red (#ff5a5a). These semantic colors are the only color in an otherwise monochrome UI. - Sidebar collapse (232<->64) is driven by body.collapsed class with MANY descendant selectors — model as a top-level state class/attribute, not per-component props. - @media 1180px: topbar tightens, .meta hides, stepper pills shrink to numbers-only except the selected pill keeps its label. - Canvas dotted grid = radial-gradient(#e3e3e1 1px) 22px tiles on --canvas-bg #f7f7f6; default view {x:60,y:80,z:0.7}; zoom clamp 0.08-3. GOTCHAS / EDGE CASES THE REWRITE MUST HANDLE: 1. RENDER-ON-POLL FOCUS GUARDS: renderBoard/renderStageExtra/renderChoices run on 2-2.5s intervals and rebuild innerHTML; they bail out if a textarea/input inside is focused (document.activeElement checks) to avoid stealing focus / interrupting typing. In React this maps naturally to controlled components + not remounting, but the polling cadence and 'don't clobber drafts' behavior must be intentional. 2. CANVAS INTERACTION FLAGS: cvDragging/cvEditing/refsViewerOpen suppress re-renders mid-interaction. Manual pointer math for pan/drag (delta/zoom) and cursor-anchored wheel zoom — no canvas lib used. 3. PER-STAGE CANVAS ISOLATION: stages 3 and 4 have separate persisted canvases; enterCanvas flushes the previous stage's debounced layout before loading the next (or last drag is lost / saved to wrong stage). 4. AGENT-PARSED STRINGS ARE LOAD-BEARING: foldClarifications() '问题澄清N/用户澄清N' format, sendPreviewFeedback region text, genAllPages/runPageMap instruction strings — these are read by the Agent/CLI; copy verbatim, do not 'clean up'. 5. DRAFT PERSISTENCE: new-project draft in localStorage (pf-new-project-draft); deploy-creds draft in-memory. 6. CONCURRENCY: run-stage returns HTTP 409 when an Agent already runs that stage — UI shows a toast and keeps state; preserve. 7. Server-driven running/waiting state for stages comes from /api/agent-log?phase=... (data.running/.waiting/.kind==='error') — not inferred client-side anymore. 8. The standalone multi-step wizard route was removed; .wz-* classes now only style the create modal + in-stage panels. Confirm wz-log/wz-substeps usage before porting (possibly dead). 9. Two nav items (资产/设置) are stubs (toast '即将上线'). 10. relTime/esc/artUrl/_svg/docIco/deviceIcon are shared helpers reused across many components — extract as utils. ESCAPING: esc() HTML-escapes all interpolated user/state text — React handles this automatically, but watch the few places that intentionally inject HTML (e.g. .replace(/\n/g,'
') in chat messages) which need dangerouslySetInnerHTML or a newline-aware renderer.

entries.name: setInterval poll (state)
entries.what: Every 2000ms fetches GET /api/state (backing file .productflow/state.json). Sets module var `state`. On first run resolves selectedPhase from URL hash #s<id> else state.current_phase via selectStage(). On later ticks calls renderBoard(), and if on a canvas stage and cvLoaded/cvStage match → renderCanvas(). Also drives renderCompatBanner() (non-7-phase legacy warning). 404 → '(等待初始化…)'.
entries.portingNotes: This is the heartbeat. Becomes channel `state` triggered by state.json writes. WS payload should carry full state (phases[], steps[], artifacts[], log[], current_phase, product). CRITICAL: the first-load hash-resolution logic (only run when selectedPhase===null) must move into client init, NOT into the WS message handler, or stage selection will re-trigger on every push. renderBoard reads heavily from `state`; keep state as single source. log is sliced last 60 reversed.

entries.name: setInterval pollProjects (home)
entries.what: HOME PAGE only. Every 3000ms fetches GET /api/projects (scans PROJECTS_DIR/*.json + per-project state.json + health.json + pending dir). Sets `homeData`, calls renderHome() which rebuilds #proj-grid + #arch-grid via projCard()/ghostCard().
entries.portingNotes: Becomes channel `projects` (global, not project-scoped) triggered by any change under PROJECTS_DIR or any project's state.json/health.json or PENDING_DIR. projCard rebuilds each render → FLICKER-PRONE. In React, key cards by p.id and let img src be stable so React diffs instead of replacing DOM.

entries.name: setInterval pollInbox
entries.what: Every 4000ms fetches GET /api/inbox (backing inbox.jsonl). Rebuilds #msgs innerHTML from messages[]. Handles 3 message types: plain, canvas-feedback (liked/comments counts), preview-feedback (regions count). Maintains scroll-stick, lastMsgCount, and chat-btn `has-unread` dot vs chatSeen.
entries.portingNotes: Becomes channel `inbox` triggered by inbox.jsonl append. Preserve: scroll-stick (only autoscroll if near bottom), unread-dot logic (lastMsgCount > chatSeen && drawer closed). Note POST /api/inbox also exists (chat send, preview feedback) — after WS, optimistic append + server echo, avoid double-render. me/agent side derived from m.from.

entries.name: setInterval pollHealth
entries.what: Every 15000ms fetches GET /api/health (backing health.json). Renders #health-line innerHTML (online dot + ms + checked-at time). Hidden if no h.url.
entries.portingNotes: Becomes channel `health` triggered by health.json write (server-side periodic smoke check). Slow cadence, low priority. Same health data also surfaces on home cards via /api/projects (p.health) — one WS health push could update both views.

entries.name: setInterval pollPages
entries.where: console.html:2518 (def 2002-2010); boot 2511; also called in enterCanvas(4), selectStage, postRedraw, addPagePrompt, page-del/gen-version handlers
entries.what: Every 5000ms fetches GET /api/pages (backing pages.json). Sets cv.pages. If cvStage===4 && selectedPhase===4 → renderCanvas() (rebuilds page cards w/ thumbnails + platform matrix).
entries.portingNotes: Becomes channel `pages` triggered by pages.json write (Agent adds pages / page versions). pageCardHtml2 rebuilds thumbnails → FLICKER on canvas. Stage-4 canvas cards must be React components keyed by page id + version file so thumbnails don't blink while Agent generates versions. Note many imperative callers also call pollPages() after mutations — replace with WS push + optimistic update.

entries.name: setInterval pollChoices
entries.what: PROJECT only. Every 3000ms fetches GET /api/choices (backing choices.json). Filters answer==null. Sets `pChoices`, renders #choices-bar floating cards (Agent yes/no/option questions). POST /api/choice answers them.
entries.portingNotes: Becomes channel `choices` triggered by choices.json write. CRITICAL guard at 1052-1053: skip re-render while an INPUT inside the bar is focused (don't interrupt typing). answerChoice does optimistic local filter then POST. In React keep controlled input state separate from WS-driven list so a push doesn't clobber a half-typed reply.

entries.name: setInterval pollUpdate
entries.what: Every 60000ms fetches GET /api/update-check (server-cached git version check). Toggles #update-bar banner with 'new version vX' + 立即更新 button. Runs on BOTH home and project pages (note: registered twice on project page lines 2515 — duplicate of one in the 2521 block? no, 2515 is the only project one; home 2534).
entries.portingNotes: Low value over WS — version rarely changes. Could stay as a slow poll OR a `system/version` channel. Path is global '/api/update-check' (no /p/<id>). loadVersion() (one-shot, /api/version) shows sidebar #sb-ver. Keep simple; not worth a per-file watcher.

entries.name: setInterval stage-extra poller (brief/explore/research/searchLog/stageRun)
entries.what: Every 2500ms, switch on selectedPhase: P1→pollBrief()+pollResearch(); P2→pollExplore()+pollSearchLog(); canvas(3/4)→pollExplore() + (P4)pollStageRun(); P5/6/7→pollStageRun(). This single interval multiplexes 5 distinct data sources by current stage.
entries.portingNotes: This is the biggest consolidation target. In WS world there is NO 'only poll the active stage' — server pushes per channel regardless of which stage is open, and React renders the active panel from whatever channel data it holds. Split into channels: brief, explore, agent-log:research, agent-log:search-refs, agent-log:stage-<n>. Drop the selectedPhase gating entirely; gate RENDER not FETCH.

entries.name: pollBrief
entries.what: GET /api/brief (backing brief.json). Reconciles into `pBrief`: description (only if textarea not focused & local empty), summary, ready, request, questions, confirmed, plus derived generating/_serverGen/failed flags (槽 gen-summary present→generating; slot vanished w/o ready→failed). Re-renders stage-extra if P1 & st-brief not focused.
entries.portingNotes: Becomes channel `brief` triggered by brief.json write. HEAVY local-vs-server reconciliation (confirmed-but-server-lagging guard at 1226-1228; generating/failed derivation 1229-1234). This optimistic-state merge must be ported faithfully or you'll get 'confirm then question flashes back' bugs. Keep textarea (description, clarify, answers) as uncontrolled/local; merge server only into non-edited fields.

entries.name: pollExplore
entries.where: console.html:1238-1254 (called selectStage(2/3/4), interval, postRedraw, genHeroes etc.)
entries.what: GET /api/explore (backing explore.json). Sets pExplore: refs, heroes, selectedRefs, selectedHero, styleSummary, heroGenFailed, heroGenLog, request (normalizes legacy single-slot {kind} → {[kind]:...} per-kind). stylePrefs only filled if local empty. Re-renders stage-extra (P2) OR renderCanvas (P3/P4 canvas).
entries.portingNotes: Becomes channel `explore` triggered by explore.json write. Drives THREE views: P2 refs panel, P3 hero canvas+dialog, overview modal. refs & heroes are grids → FLICKER-PRONE (refs gallery, hero cards). request map is per-kind concurrent slots (search-refs/collect-ref/gen-heroes) used to show spinners — preserve per-kind semantics. selectedRefs/stylePrefs are also locally mutated + POSTed; reconcile carefully.

entries.name: pollSearchLog
entries.what: GET /api/agent-log?phase=search-refs (backing agent-log-search-refs.jsonl). Reads last line; if kind==='error' sets pExplore.searchFailed and re-renders P2 panel (shows '访问失败重试').
entries.portingNotes: Becomes channel `agent-log:search-refs`. Only the tail-line kind matters for this view. WS push of the jsonl append; client keeps last line. Self-gates to selectedPhase===2 — drop fetch gate, keep render gate.

entries.name: pollResearch
entries.what: GET /api/agent-log?phase=research (agent-log-research.jsonl). Tail line → researchLog.line/running/failed (running = kind not in done|error). Re-renders P1 if st-brief not focused.
entries.portingNotes: Becomes channel `agent-log:research`. Same tail-line pattern as searchLog. researchLog also holds local `instr` (重做要求 input) — keep separate from WS tail data.

entries.name: pollStageRun
entries.what: GET /api/agent-log?phase=stage-<phase> (agent-log-stage-N.jsonl). Reads data.running (server truth), data.waiting (blocked on choice), tail text, last.kind==='error'→failed. Writes pStageRun[phase] keeping local `instr`. P4→renderCanvas (stagebar), others→renderStageExtra if st-stage-req not focused.
entries.portingNotes: Becomes channel `agent-log:stage-<n>` (n=4,5,6,7). IMPORTANT: running/waiting come from server runtime flags (data.running/data.waiting), not just log lines — the WS server must include those flags in the push, not only the jsonl tail. pStageRun is a phase-keyed map; preserve per-phase `instr` local field across pushes (don't overwrite user's redo text).

entries.name: pollDeployCreds
entries.what: GET /api/deploy-creds (backing ~/.productflow/secrets/, returns keys[] masked). Sets pDeployCreds, re-renders P7 if active. NOT on any setInterval — fetched on stage entry + after save/remove/clear mutations only.
entries.portingNotes: Low-frequency, mutation-driven. Could be a channel `deploy-creds` but realistically only changes from this UI's own POSTs → optimistic update + refetch is fine; no server-side watcher needed. Secrets stored outside repo (600 perms).

entries.name: loadWizard
entries.what: GET /api/wizard (backing wizard.json). Sets pfWizard {primary, platforms}. Re-renders P6/P7 stage-extra so preview/deploy button text adapts to platform (PC/H5/APP). One-shot at boot, not polled.
entries.portingNotes: Rarely changes after project creation. Channel `wizard` optional; simplest is fetch-once on load + refetch if create flow edits it. Drives button COPY only (📱构建模拟器 vs 🖥本地运行 etc.).

entries.name: loadCanvas
entries.where: console.html:1692-1701 (called by enterCanvas, cvSave uses same file)
entries.what: GET /api/canvas?stage=<3|4> (backing canvas.json = {"3":{view,items,notes},"4":{...}}). Loads cv.view/items/notes for one stage. Paired with debounced POST /api/canvas (cvSave, 600ms) + flushCanvasSave on stage-leave.
entries.portingNotes: Canvas LAYOUT (positions/zoom) is user-owned, written by THIS client (debounced). Do NOT make it a push-on-change channel that echoes the client's own writes back (would fight in-progress drags — note renderCanvas already bails if cvEditing||cvDragging, line 1873). Keep canvas layout as request/response + local optimistic; only the CONTENT (heroes/pages = explore/pages channels) needs WS. Server serializes writes via _CANVAS_LOCK.

entries.name: loadVersion
entries.what: GET /api/version → sidebar #sb-ver text 'vX'. One-shot at boot on both pages.
entries.portingNotes: Static per session. No channel needed; fetch once on mount.

entries.name: module state: `state`
entries.what: The whole project state object from /api/state: {product, current_phase, phases[{id,name,status,steps[],artifacts[]}], log[]}. Read by renderBoard, renderCompatBanner, selectStage/nextStage, runStageHtml, previewSectionHtml, openOverview, briefSectionHtml (phase 1 steps), stagebar logic.
entries.portingNotes: Single most-read store. In React this is the root state context fed by the `state` WS channel. Everything stage-related derives from state.phases.find(id===selectedPhase).

entries.name: module state: `selectedPhase`
entries.what: Currently viewed phase id (1-7). null until first poll resolves it. Drives view switching (board vs canvas), which sub-poll runs, all render gating. Persisted to URL hash #s<id> via history.replaceState in selectStage; restored on load and hashchange.
entries.portingNotes: Becomes router/URL state (React Router or hash). Decouple from polling: in WS model selectedPhase only gates WHICH panel renders, never which data fetches. Keep hash sync + hashchange listener (2427-2430).

entries.name: module state: `homeData`, `archOpen`
entries.what: homeData = /api/projects response {projects[], pending[]}; archOpen toggles archived grid. Read by renderHome, openDelete (find project).
entries.portingNotes: Home page store fed by `projects` channel. archOpen is pure UI toggle (local).

entries.name: module state: `pBrief`
entries.what: P1 brief state: {description, summary{goal,users,need,scope}, ready, generating, request, clarify, questions[], answers{}, confirmed, _serverGen, failed}. Mixed server-synced + local-draft fields. Read by briefSectionHtml, foldClarifications, genSummary, confirmBrief.
entries.portingNotes: Split into server-synced (summary/ready/questions/confirmed/request from `brief` channel) and local-draft (description textarea, clarify, answers picks). The reconciliation guards (confirmed-lag, generating/failed derivation) are subtle — port verbatim. answers{} is index-keyed to questions[].

entries.name: module state: `pExplore`
entries.what: P2/P3 state: {stylePrefs[], request{}, refs[], selectedRefs[], styleSummary, heroes[], selectedHero, searchFailed, heroGenFailed, heroGenLog[]}. Read by refsPanelHtml, stagebarHtml, stageCards(P3), renderHeroDialog, selectedRefCards, openOverview.
entries.portingNotes: Fed by `explore` channel + `agent-log:search-refs` (searchFailed). request{} holds per-kind in-flight slots (search-refs/collect-ref/gen-heroes) for spinners. stylePrefs/selectedRefs locally mutable + POSTed. heroGenLog drives the P3 dialog generation history. refs/heroes → → flicker.

entries.name: module state: `pStageRun` (map)
entries.what: phase→{line, running, waiting, failed, instr}. Per-phase agent run status from agent-log-stage-N + server flags. Read by runStageHtml, stagebarHtml(P4), doRunStage/doRunAction guards.
entries.portingNotes: Fed by `agent-log:stage-<n>` channels carrying running/waiting flags. Keep `instr` (user redo text) local & survive pushes. Used as a double-click/concurrency guard (running===true blocks re-trigger; server also 409s).

entries.name: module state: `pfWizard`
entries.what: {primary, platforms[]} from wizard.json. Drives P6 preview button + P7 deploy button COPY per platform.
entries.portingNotes: Static-ish; fetch once. Only affects button labels.

entries.name: module state: `pDeployCreds`
entries.what: {keys[](masked), draft{}}. P7 secrets. draft = unsaved input buffer, keys = stored masked list.
entries.portingNotes: Mutation-driven (this UI only). keys from server, draft purely local input state.

entries.name: module state: `researchLog`
entries.what: {line, running, failed, instr}. P1 market-research agent status from agent-log-research tail.
entries.portingNotes: Fed by `agent-log:research`. instr (redo input) is local. Mirror of pStageRun pattern but single (not map).

entries.name: module state: `pChoices`
entries.what: Array of unanswered Agent choice questions (answer==null) from choices.json. Read by renderChoices (floating bar).
entries.portingNotes: Fed by `choices` channel. Optimistic removal on answer. Guard against re-render while input focused.

entries.name: module state: `cv` (+ cvStage/cvLoaded/cvSaveTimer/cvDirty/cvDragging/cvEditing)
entries.what: cv={view{x,y,z}, items{id:{x,y}}, notes[], pages[]}. cvStage=3|4 loaded. cvLoaded gate. cvSaveTimer/cvDirty for 600ms debounce. cvDragging/cvEditing block renderCanvas during interaction. items = per-card positions; pages = pages.json content; view = pan/zoom.
entries.portingNotes: cv.view & cv.items are USER-OWNED layout (request/response + debounced POST). cv.pages is server content (`pages` channel). cv.heroes come from pExplore. The dragging/editing render-suppression (renderCanvas bails at 1873) is essential to stop WS pushes from yanking a card mid-drag — replicate with a 'isInteracting' ref that pauses store→DOM sync.

entries.name: module state: `pvState`
entries.what: {mode:'feedback'|'redraw', file, title, boxes[], stage, pageId, platform}. Preview/redraw modal: boxes are normalized 0-1 region selections drawn on image. Read by renderPvBoxes, pvSend→sendPreviewFeedback/doEditImage.
entries.portingNotes: Pure local UI/interaction state (modal). No WS. boxes built by pointer drag handlers (2154-2199). On send: feedback→POST /api/inbox(type preview-feedback) + optional rerun stage 6; redraw→POST /api/redraw or explore gen-heroes baseImage.

entries.name: module state: `nm`, `delTarget`, `NM_DRAFT_KEY` localStorage
entries.what: nm = new-project wizard draft (name/slug/platforms/primary/priority), persisted to localStorage. delTarget = project pending deletion. Both pure local UI.
entries.portingNotes: Local form state only; nm draft persists in localStorage (restore on modal open). No WS involvement.

entries.name: module state: chat unread (`lastMsgCount`,`chatSeen`)
entries.what: Track inbox msg count vs seen to show chat-btn unread dot. Updated in pollInbox/toggleChatDrawer.
entries.portingNotes: Derive from `inbox` channel length vs a seen marker stored on drawer-open. Keep dot logic.

entries.name: render: renderHome → #proj-grid/#arch-grid
entries.what: Rebuilds project card wall + archived grid from homeData via projCard()/ghostCard().
entries.portingNotes: projCard embeds per project → FLICKER on every 3s poll. React: keyed with stable img src; only re-render changed cards. Reads homeData.

entries.name: render: projCard / ghostCard
entries.what: Single project card HTML: cover img or placeholder, name+flags(working/health), phase segs, done/total, relTime; ghost = pending CLI cards.
entries.portingNotes: FLICKER-PRONE (rebuilds cover ). Convert to component. Reads p.* fields from homeData.projects.

entries.name: render: renderBoard (5 innerHTML sites)
entries.what: Master board render: top step pills, phase title+status, step list, artifacts gallery, activity log. Then calls renderStageExtra(). Reads `state` + selectedPhase.
entries.portingNotes: #gallery rebuilds artifact tags (artUrl with ?t=ts cache-bust) → FLICKER-PRONE on every 2s state poll. Split into 5 components; key gallery items by file; keep artUrl ts so updated artifacts bust cache but unchanged ones keep stable src (React won't reload). scrollIntoView on selected pill (1188).

entries.name: render: renderStageExtra → #stage-extra
entries.what: Stage-specific panel dispatcher: P1→briefSectionHtml, P2→refsPanelHtml+initRefsViewer, P5/6/7→runStageHtml, else ''. GUARD: bails if a textarea/input inside is focused, or if refs viewer open (P2).
entries.portingNotes: The focus-guard (1270-1271) and viewer-open guard (1272) are why polling doesn't nuke user input — in React these become 'don't let WS push remount the panel while editing'. Use controlled inputs with local state so a push to surrounding data doesn't reset the field.

entries.name: render: briefSectionHtml → (within #stage-extra)
entries.what: P1 panel: product-desc textarea, AI summary card (ready/running/failed states), clarification question chips + supplement textarea, gen/confirm buttons, market-research card with running/failed states. Reads pBrief + researchLog + state.phases[1].steps.
entries.portingNotes: Many conditional states (ready/running/failed/hasQuestions). textareas st-brief/st-clarify must be local-controlled (oninput writes pBrief directly, render skipped while focused). Port the multi-state machine carefully.

entries.name: render: refsPanelHtml → (within #stage-extra) + initRefsViewer
entries.what: P2 panel: style tag chips, find-refs button, ref cards grid (each with , select/zoom/source/more-like), URL-collect input, hidden Viewer.js gallery, searching/failed states. Reads pExplore.
entries.portingNotes: FLICKER-PRONE (ref card grid rebuilt each poll). Viewer.js is initialized against a hidden gallery div and must be destroyed/recreated on render (1637) — in React wrap in effect keyed to refs list; guard renderStageExtra bails while viewer open. selectedRefs toggle is optimistic+POST.

entries.name: render: runStageHtml → (within #stage-extra)
entries.what: P5/6/7 panel: title/hint, optional redo input, main run button (platform-aware copy for P7), P6 preview button, reveal-code button, running/waiting/failed status box. Embeds deployCredsHtml (P7) + previewSectionHtml (P6). Reads pStageRun[phase], pfWizard, state.
entries.portingNotes: Button copy depends on pfWizard.primary. running/waiting/failed from pStageRun (agent-log channel). st-stage-req input local. Port the platform-conditional labels (1488-1499).

entries.name: render: deployCredsHtml / previewSectionHtml
entries.what: deployCredsHtml: P7 secret inputs + stored masked list (reads pDeployCreds). previewSectionHtml: P6 finished-product screenshot thumbnails → openPreview (reads state.phases[6].artifacts images).
entries.portingNotes: previewSectionHtml thumbnails are → mild flicker; key by file. deployCreds draft inputs local.

entries.name: render: renderChoices → #choices-bar
entries.what: Floating Agent-question cards: question text, option chips, free-text reply input. Reads pChoices. Skips re-render while an input is focused (1052-1053).
entries.portingNotes: Fed by `choices` channel. Preserve focus-skip guard; controlled reply input.

entries.name: render: renderInbox (#msgs, inside pollInbox)
entries.what: Chat drawer message list, 3 message types, scroll-stick. Reads /api/inbox messages.
entries.portingNotes: Fed by `inbox` channel. Keyed message list; scroll-stick logic preserved.

entries.name: render: renderCanvas (#cv-world, #cv-stagebar, #cv-empty, .cv-hint)
entries.what: Rebuilds entire canvas: stagebar (stagebarHtml), all cards (heroCardHtml/pageCardHtml2 from stageCards()), empty state, hint text. cvApply() transform. renderHeroDialog(). GUARD: bails if !cvLoaded or cvEditing or cvDragging.
entries.portingNotes: MOST FLICKER-PRONE: full #cv-world innerHTML rebuild including every hero/page on every explore/pages push. MUST become keyed React nodes (key=card.id) so dragging a card or an Agent updating one image doesn't blink the whole board. The cvDragging/cvEditing bail is the critical anti-yank guard — replicate. cv-world transform (pan/zoom) should be a CSS transform on a stable container, never re-created.

entries.name: render: heroCardHtml / pageCardHtml2 / stagebarHtml
entries.what: heroCardHtml: P3 hero card +base toggle+delete. pageCardHtml2: P4 page card thumbnail + platform matrix (PC/H5/APP badges, on=has version). stagebarHtml: P3 gen-hero / P4 list-pages+batch+tidy controls with running/failed states.
entries.portingNotes: Both rebuild → FLICKER. pageCardHtml2 platform matrix: empty badge → confirm+gen-version (real claude spawn), on badge → openArtifact preview. Card aspect ratio follows platform (PC horizontal vs phone vertical). Key by card id + version file.

entries.name: render: renderHeroDialog → #hd-body, #hd-go
entries.what: P3 right-side generate dialog: selected-ref thumbnails with code labels (图1/图2) + include/exclude toggles, generation-history log (heroGenLog with result thumbnails), generating/failed states, generate button. Only shown when cvStage===3. Reads pExplore + heroRefOff + hdCollapsed.
entries.portingNotes: Rebuilds ref + history thumbnails → flicker. The 图N code↔--image order mapping (selectedRefCards order) is load-bearing for the model call — preserve ordering. heroRefOff (local exclude set) + hdCollapsed local UI. insertRefCode mutates a textarea by cursor — keep imperative or use controlled w/ care.

entries.name: render: renderPvBoxes → #pv-boxes
entries.what: Preview/redraw modal: draws normalized region boxes over image with labels/delete. Reads pvState.boxes. Updates action button copy by mode/box-count.
entries.portingNotes: Pure local interaction (no WS). Boxes from pointer drag. Port to React overlay positioned by % coords.

entries.name: render: openOverview → #modal-body
entries.what: All-artifacts overview modal: Promise.all fetches /api/brief + /api/explore + /api/pages, then aggregates per-phase cards (brief summary text, refs, heroes, page×platform versions, state.json artifacts). Reads state + the 3 fetched blobs.
entries.portingNotes: On-demand aggregate; in WS world can read from already-subscribed brief/explore/pages stores instead of refetching (no need for 3 fetches if channels are live). _ovImgCard rebuilds but it's a one-shot modal → flicker not an issue. Could drop the Promise.all entirely.

entries.name: render: openArtifact → #modal-body
entries.what:
Artifact viewer modal: image (), html (open new tab), mindmap (lazy-load d3+markmap, render SVG), text/md (
). Reads url/title/type args.
entries.portingNotes: Local on-demand. markmap lazy-loads vendor scripts (ensureMarkmap). Port as modal component; mindmap path needs dynamic import of vendor libs.

entries.name: render: renderHealth (#health-line), renderCompatBanner (#compat-banner), pollUpdate (#update-bar), updateMsg (#update-msg)
entries.what: health-line: online status. compat-banner: legacy <7-phase warning (reads state.phases.length). update-bar: new-version banner + update button. Small innerHTML sites.
entries.portingNotes: compat-banner reads `state` (channel). health/update from their slow channels/polls. Minor; low flicker.

entries.name: render: renderNewModal/renderDelModal (#new-body/#del-body)
entries.what: New-project modal (name/slug/platform picker/priority drag) and delete-confirm modal innerHTML. Local form state (nm/delTarget).
entries.portingNotes: Pure local; no WS. Event-delegation handlers on #new-body (969-1011) for platform/primary/priority-drag — convert to React handlers.

dataflow.notes: ENDPOINT→FILE MAP (confirmed in scripts/server.py, used for channel/trigger design): /api/state→state.json (1164); /api/inbox→inbox.jsonl (1171); /api/agent-log?phase=X→agent-log-X.jsonl (107-108,1176); /api/canvas→canvas.json (per-stage keys "3"/"4", _CANVAS_LOCK serialized, 1200-1205,935); /api/health→health.json (1215); /api/pages→pages.json (1223); /api/choices→choices.json (1227); /api/deploy-creds→~/.productflow/secrets/ (1233); /api/explore→explore.json (1239); /api/brief→brief.json (1246); /api/wizard→wizard.json (1251); /api/projects→PROJECTS_DIR/*.json + each project state.json/health.json + PENDING_DIR (965-1086); /api/version, /api/update-check, /api/update are GLOBAL (no /p/). PROPOSED WEBSOCKET CHANNELS (channel : backing-file watcher that triggers push): 1. state : .productflow/state.json (replaces poll@2s) — also re-derive home card data 2. inbox : .productflow/inbox.jsonl (replaces pollInbox@4s) 3. health : .productflow/health.json (replaces pollHealth@15s) 4. pages : .productflow/pages.json (replaces pollPages@5s) 5. choices : .productflow/choices.json (replaces pollChoices@3s) 6. brief : .productflow/brief.json (replaces pollBrief) 7. explore : .productflow/explore.json (replaces pollExplore) — drives P2 refs, P3 heroes, overview 8. agent-log:research : agent-log-research.jsonl (replaces pollResearch) — push tail line + done/error kind 9. agent-log:search-refs : agent-log-search-refs.jsonl (replaces pollSearchLog) — push tail kind 10. agent-log:stage- : agent-log-stage-N.jsonl + RUNTIME running/waiting flags (replaces pollStageRun) — n∈{4,5,6,7}; CRITICAL: server must include data.running/data.waiting, not just jsonl tail 11. projects (global): PROJECTS_DIR + per-project state/health + PENDING_DIR (replaces pollProjects@3s) — home page only 12. wizard : wizard.json (or fetch-once) — replaces loadWizard one-shot 13. system/version : git version cache — replaces pollUpdate@60s (low value; could stay polled) NOT channels (keep request/response, client-owned): /api/canvas layout (view/items/notes — written by THIS client, debounced 600ms; echoing it back would fight live drags — see renderCanvas bail at 1873 on cvDragging/cvEditing). deploy-creds (only mutated by this UI). loadVersion (static). All POST mutation endpoints (/api/brief,/explore,/choice,/run-stage,/run-action,/redraw,/pages,/create,/research,/reveal,/deploy-creds,/inbox) remain POST; the resulting file change flows back via the matching channel — enables clean optimistic-update-then-confirm. FLICKER-PRONE RENDERS (rebuild on every push — MUST be keyed React components, not innerHTML): (a) project cards #proj-grid (cover img, projCard); (b) board artifacts #gallery (renderBoard, artUrl ?t= cache-bust); (c) P2 ref cards grid (refsPanelHtml) + Viewer.js gallery; (d) P3 hero cards + hero-dialog ref/history thumbs; (e) P4 page cards thumbnails (pageCardHtml2); (f) whole #cv-world canvas rebuild (renderCanvas). For all of these: stable keys + stable img src (keep ?t=ts only when the artifact actually changed) so React diffs instead of dropping/recreating , eliminating blink. CRITICAL PORTING GOTCHAS (optimistic/local-vs-server reconciliation that exists ONLY to survive polling — must be re-expressed for WS): - Focus guards: renderStageExtra (1270-1271), renderChoices (1052-1053), pollBrief/pollResearch/pollStageRun all skip re-render while the relevant input/textarea is focused. In React: controlled inputs backed by LOCAL state so an incoming WS push to surrounding data never resets the field; never remount a panel containing a focused field. - Canvas anti-yank: renderCanvas bails on cvEditing||cvDragging (1873); pointer handlers set cvDragging. Replicate with an isInteracting ref that pauses store→DOM application for canvas item positions. - Brief confirm-lag guard (1226-1234): keeps local confirmed=true until server catches up, and derives generating/failed from presence/absence of request slot. Port verbatim or get 'confirm → question flashes back' / 'spinner never stops after failure'. - request{} per-kind in-flight slots (explore: search-refs/collect-ref/gen-heroes; brief: gen-summary): drive spinners; server legacy single-slot normalized at 1248. These are how the UI knows an Agent op is running — keep per-kind. - pStageRun running/waiting come from SERVER runtime flags (not log tail) — the agent-log:stage WS push MUST carry them. - Local-only fields that must survive every push: pStageRun[n].instr, researchLog.instr, pBrief.description/clarify/answers, pExplore.stylePrefs/selectedRefs (optimistically mutated then POSTed), heroRefOff, hdCollapsed, pvState, nm (localStorage), cv.view/cv.items (debounced own-write). - URL hash #s ↔ selectedPhase (selectStage replaceState 1087; hashchange 2427-2430; first-load resolve in poll 1115-1119). Move first-load resolution to init, NOT the WS message handler. - selectStage triggers per-stage fetches today (1094-1097); in WS model subscriptions are always live — selectStage should only switch the visible panel, optionally flush canvas (flushCanvasSave on leaving canvas, 1089). - Cache-busting: artUrl appends ?t=ts (716) so updated artifacts reload; preserve to avoid stale images, but only change ts when file changes (keep stable otherwise for diffing). - Concurrency guards: doRunStage/doRunAction/runPageMap/genAllPages check pStageRun running + server returns 409; keep both. - pollUpdate is registered on project page (2515) AND home page (2534); loadVersion + pollUpdate use GLOBAL '/api/...' paths even on project pages.

entries.name: Infinite-canvas pan/drag/zoom controller (single pointer handler IIFE)
entries.where: console.html:2202-2303 (vp=#view-canvas); world transform applied by cvApply() 2012-2015
entries.what: One IIFE binds pointerdown/move/up/wheel/dblclick/click on #view-canvas. pointerdown: button!==0 ignored; if e.target.closest of any interactive subzone (textarea, .cv-base, .cv-page-del, .cv-del, .cv-plat, .cv-controls, #cv-stagebar, #hero-dialog) → bail (let inner handlers run). If target.closest('.cv-item') → mode='item' (drag card: capture ox/oy from cv.items[id], add .dragging, cvDragging=true). Else mode='pan' (snapshot cv.view.x/y, add .panning). pointermove: dx/dy from start; if |dx|+|dy|>3 set moved=true; FIRST move after threshold calls vp.setPointerCapture(e.pointerId) once (captured flag). pan: cv.view.x=ox+dx, y=oy+dy, cvApply(). item: p.x=ox+dx/cv.view.z, p.y=oy+dy/cv.view.z (divide by zoom so card tracks cursor at any scale), write dragEl.style.left/top directly (not full re-render). pointerup: if mode → cvSave() (debounced persist); remove .dragging/.panning, reset all. cursor:grab on #view-canvas, grabbing via .panning class.
entries.portingNotes: This is the single highest-risk port. Must use Pointer Events (not mouse), with setPointerCapture on the canvas element via a ref. Keep the 3px move threshold to distinguish click vs drag (clicks fire separately via the click listener). The closest()-bail allowlist is load-bearing: in React, hit-testing must replicate exactly which subzones swallow the gesture, or drag will hijack buttons/badges. Card position update during drag writes style directly for perf — in React, mutate a ref/transform imperatively during drag, commit to state only on pointerup (re-rendering every move will jank). cv.items is a plain object keyed by card id ('hero:'+id / 'page:'+id). The dragId/dragEl/moved/captured are closure locals — model as a useRef drag-session object. cvDragging/cvEditing gate renderCanvas() (line 1873) to avoid clobbering an in-progress drag — replicate by skipping reconciliation/poll-driven re-render while dragging.

entries.name: Canvas world transform math + zoom-at-cursor (cvApply / cvZoomAt / cvZoomBy / cvFit)
entries.what: World is #cv-world with transform-origin:0 0 and transform: translate(x,y) scale(z). cvApply writes that transform + updates #cv-zoom text to round(z*100)+'%'. cvZoomAt(cx,cy,factor): z2=clamp(z*factor, 0.08, 3); k=z2/z; x = cx-(cx-x)*k; y = cy-(cy-y)*k (keeps point under cursor fixed). cvZoomBy(f) zooms about viewport center via getBoundingClientRect. cvFit: bbox over cv.items values (x..x+ITEM_W, y-40..y+320 padding), z=clamp(min(vp.w/bbox.w, vp.h/bbox.h),0.08,2), centers content. Constants: ITEM_W=320, CARD_GAP=44, GRID_COLS=4, ROW_GAP=500 (1684).
entries.portingNotes: Pure math — port verbatim. Screen→world conversion appears in three places (drag uses /z, zoom uses the cx-(cx-x)*k formula, wheel passes clientX-rect.left). Keep transform-origin 0 0. Coordinate spaces: pointer client coords → subtract canvas rect → that's the zoom anchor in viewport space; card positions are in WORLD space (px before scale). The /cv.view.z divide in drag converts viewport delta to world delta. cvFit's padding asymmetry (y-40 top, +320 bottom, because card visuals extend below the stored top-left) must be preserved or fit clips cards.

entries.name: Canvas wheel zoom + horizontal pan
entries.what: wheel with {passive:false}, e.preventDefault(). If ctrlKey/metaKey OR |deltaY|>|deltaX| → cvZoomAt(clientX-rect.left, clientY-rect.top, Math.exp(-deltaY*0.0018)) (pinch/trackpad-pinch and vertical wheel = zoom). Else horizontal scroll → cv.view.x -= deltaX; cvApply(); cvSave().
entries.portingNotes: Must register with {passive:false} and call preventDefault — React onWheel is passive by default in some setups, so attach via ref+addEventListener('wheel',h,{passive:false}) in useEffect, NOT the JSX onWheel prop (page will scroll/zoom-browser otherwise, esp. on ctrl+wheel = browser zoom). The exp(-deltaY*0.0018) curve gives smooth trackpad zoom; keep the constant. ctrl/meta detection routes trackpad pinch (browsers send wheel+ctrlKey) to zoom.

entries.name: Canvas persistence to /api/canvas (cvSave debounce / flushCanvasSave / loadCanvas / enterCanvas)
entries.where: console.html:1692-1738; flush on stage-leave at selectStage 1089
entries.what: loadCanvas(stage): GET /api/canvas?stage=N → {view, items, notes}. cvSave(): sets cvDirty, debounces 600ms, POST /api/canvas {stage:String, view, items, notes}. flushCanvasSave(): if dirty, clearTimeout + immediate POST using the LEAVING stage id (captured in local var st) — prevents last drag loss & cross-stage leakage. enterCanvas(stage): awaits flushCanvasSave() of previous, resets cv.items/notes/view to defaults, shows 'loading' placeholder in #cv-world, loadCanvas, cvLoaded=true, (stage4→pollPages), renderCanvas. Two distinct canvases (stage 3 hero, stage 4 pages) never share state.
entries.portingNotes: Debounce + flush-on-unmount is critical: must flush pending save when leaving a canvas stage (selectStage line 1089 calls flushCanvasSave before switching display) AND capture the stage id at debounce-schedule time so the in-flight save targets the correct stage even if user switched. In React: useEffect cleanup on stage change must await/fire the flush; store the target stage in the closure, not in current state. cvStage vs selectedPhase are separate — cvStage is which canvas is currently materialized; poll() (1120) only re-renders canvas if cvLoaded && cvStage===selectedPhase.

entries.name: Canvas dblclick → preview or edit-layer (openRedraw / openArtifact)
entries.what: dblclick on .cv-item: stage3 with dataset.file → openRedraw(file,title,3,null,''); stage4 with dataset.pgid → find page, find first version with file → openRedraw(v.file,name,4,pg.id,v.platform) (no version = no edit); else dataset.img → openArtifact(img,...,'image'). Double-click is the ONLY entry to the per-image edit/redraw layer (cards have no ✏️ button).
entries.portingNotes: Must coexist with single-click and drag on same element — order matters: drag threshold (3px) prevents click during drag; dblclick is native. In React keep dblclick as a separate handler; ensure it reads the same dataset (id/file/pgid/title/img) — port these as data passed via closure/props, not DOM dataset, but the dispatch logic per cvStage must match.

entries.name: Canvas click dispatch (set-base / delete hero / delete page / platform badge gen+view)
entries.what: click on #view-canvas delegates: .cv-base → setHeroBase(file) POST /api/explore {selectedHero}; .cv-del → removeHero(id) POST /api/explore {removeHero}; .cv-page-del → POST /api/pages {action:'remove',id} then pollPages; .cv-plat.on[data-file] → openArtifact(view that platform's design); .cv-plat:not(.on) → confirm() then POST /api/pages {action:'gen-version',id,platform} (spawns claude, so confirm guards). Single click on hero no longer enters edit mode (comment 2301).
entries.portingNotes: This is event-delegation on the canvas container distinguishing many sub-targets by class. In React, attach onClick handlers directly to each sub-element (button/badge) and stopPropagation so the pan handler's closest()-bail (line 2208-2210) is unnecessary for those — BUT note the pan pointerdown already bails on these same selectors, so React components must stopPropagation on pointerDown too, or attach pointer handlers only to the canvas background. Empty-platform-badge click uses window.confirm before spawning agent — keep a confirm/modal.

entries.name: Preview圈选 annotation drawing (normalized 0..1 boxes via pointer)
entries.what: On #pv-stage (cursor:crosshair, touch-action:none): pointerdown (unless on .pvx delete) preventDefault, frac(e) maps clientX/Y minus getBoundingClientRect to clamped 0..1 {x,y}; setPointerCapture; show #pv-draft. pointermove updates draft rect via min/abs of start vs current (handles drag any direction). pointerup: compute x=min(sx,px),y=min(sy,py),w=abs,h=abs; if w<0.02||h<0.02 ignore (mis-tap). If mode='redraw' push {x,y,w,h,text:''} (text via shared #pv-instr textarea); if mode='feedback' prompt() for per-box text, push if non-empty. renderPvBoxes draws each box as %-positioned div with numbered label + ✕. #pv-boxes click on .pvx splices that box.
entries.portingNotes: Coordinates are stored normalized (0..1) so they survive any display size — REQUIRED for the Agent to remap to source pixels. Port frac() with getBoundingClientRect on the image stage element (ref). Use Pointer Events + setPointerCapture + touch-action:none (already in CSS .pv-stage) so touch drag works and doesn't scroll. The 0.02 min-size mis-tap filter must stay. Two modes share the stage: redraw (box=region only, text in shared textarea) vs feedback (each box gets its own text via window.prompt — replace prompt with an inline input in React but preserve per-box text model). #pv-draft is a live preview rect distinct from committed #pv-boxes.

entries.name: Preview feedback POST + redraw POST (coordinate mapping & batch)
entries.what: sendPreviewFeedback (mode feedback): requires ≥1 box; regions=[{n,x,y,w,h,text}] each toFixed(4); builds human-readable text '区域(左X% 上Y% 宽W% 高H%):text'; POST /api/inbox {text,type:'preview-feedback',file,regions}; then pollInbox, closePreview, and window.confirm to optionally trigger /api/run-stage phase6 with the feedback as instruction (sets pStageRun[6].running). doEditImage (mode redraw): instr from #pv-instr; if boxes→postRedraw {stage,file,regions(toFixed4),prompt,pageId,platform} to /api/redraw with toast '局部重绘'; elif stage3→POST /api/explore gen-heroes {baseImage,instruction} (whole-image hero regen); else postRedraw with regions:[] (whole page redraw). postRedraw posts /api/redraw, on ok closePreview + delayed pollExplore/pollPages after 4s.
entries.portingNotes: toFixed(4) precision on normalized coords is the wire contract — keep it. Three divergent redraw paths by stage (3 whole-image→/api/explore; 3 region & 4 any→/api/redraw) must be preserved exactly. The post-send confirm() that optionally kicks /api/run-stage is a UX bridge (feedback otherwise only lands in inbox) — replicate as a modal. Endpoints: /api/inbox (type preview-feedback), /api/redraw, /api/run-stage, /api/explore.

entries.name: Hero-generation dialog (#hero-dialog): ref insertion 图N, generate, edit
entries.what: Right-side dialog, only when cvStage===3 (renderHeroDialog toggles .on). Lists selectedRefCards() (refs in selectedRefs order — code 图N must match --image order fed to model). Each ref thumb: click image inserts its code (图1/图2) at textarea cursor via insertRefCode (selectionStart/End splice + smart leading-space + refocus/setSelectionRange); a checkbox (toggleHeroRef) excludes a ref from this gen (heroRefOff map) which re-numbers remaining codes. dialogGenerate: reads #hd-text, usedFiles=selected minus off (in order), builds req {kind:'gen-heroes',selectedRefs, refFiles?, instruction?}, POST /api/explore, clears textarea. Shows gen-log entries (mode gen/edit, ts, ref→result counts, thumbs, prompt). toggleHeroDialog collapses (hd-head onclick). Header/+go buttons.
entries.portingNotes: insertRefCode does manual textarea cursor manipulation (selectionStart/selectionEnd, setSelectionRange, focus) — in React use a ref to the <textarea>, read/write .selectionStart directly and setState value, then restore caret in a useLayoutEffect (controlled inputs reset caret otherwise). The ordering contract is subtle: 图N numbering follows selectedRefs order filtered by heroRefOff, and refFiles sent to server must be in that SAME order so 图N maps to --image N. heroRefOff is per-session UI state (not persisted). Dialog visibility is derived from cvStage===3. The whole-image edit path from openRedraw also routes here (gen-heroes baseImage).

entries.name: Viewer.js image zoom integration (refs gallery)
entries.where: console.html:1633-1649 (initRefsViewer/zoomRef); hidden gallery 1579-1580; vendor at HTML 545/704
entries.what: Stage-2 refs panel renders a hidden #refs-viewer div containing all ref . initRefsViewer destroys any prior Viewer and news up `new Viewer(g,{navbar,title:false,transition:false,keyboard:true,shown/hidden callbacks})`. shown/hidden set refsViewerOpen flag. zoomRef(id) finds index and calls refsViewer.view(idx). The visible ref cards are decoupled from the gallery (avoids click=select vs click=zoom conflict); '🔍放大' button calls zoomRef. renderStageExtra bails if refsViewerOpen (line 1272) so polling won't tear down the open viewer.
entries.portingNotes: Viewer.js is an imperative jQuery-style lib operating on a DOM node. In React: keep the hidden gallery as a ref'd div, instantiate Viewer in useEffect, and CRITICALLY destroy()+recreate when the ref list changes (current code destroys on every initRefsViewer). Guard re-renders while viewer is open (the refsViewerOpen flag gates renderStageExtra) — port as: skip list reconciliation while viewer modal open, or React will unmount the node Viewer holds. keyboard:true gives arrow/esc nav inside Viewer. Decoupling zoom (button) from select (card click) is intentional — preserve.

entries.name: Markmap mind-map rendering in modal (d3 + markmap-lib + markmap-view, lazy-loaded)
entries.what: For artifact type 'mindmap': modal box gets .wide, sets innerHTML '<svg id="mm-svg">', shows modal, ensureMarkmap() lazily loads /vendor/d3.min.js then markmap-lib.js then markmap-view.js sequentially (once, mmLoaded flag), fetches the .md text, `new Transformer().transform(md)` → root, `Markmap.create('#mm-svg', {duration:300,maxWidth:340,paddingX:18,autoFit:true,initialExpandLevel:-1, color: grayscale palette by node path depth}, root)`. Grayscale palette indexed by parseInt(node.state.path.split('.')[1]).
entries.portingNotes: Three vendored scripts loaded on demand via injected <script> tags (window.markmap, window.d3 globals). In React: lazy-import or inject once and memoize the loaded promise (ensureMarkmap's mmLoaded). Markmap.create targets a CSS selector '#mm-svg' and mutates an SVG imperatively — render an empty <svg ref> and pass the node, re-create on each open, and clean up on modal close. autoFit + initialExpandLevel:-1 (fully expanded) + the path-depth color fn must be kept. Load ORDER matters (d3 first). CSS for .markmap-foreign already styles fonts/code.

entries.name: Generic artifact preview modal (openArtifact / closeModal) by type
entries.what:
openArtifact(url,title,type): image→; html→window.open(url,'_blank') and return (no modal); mindmap→markmap branch above; else (md/json/code)→fetch text into 
 escaped. Sets #modal-title, toggles .wide for mindmap, shows #modal. closeModal hides. Used by gallery cards, overview cards, canvas dblclick on plain images, platform-version view.
entries.portingNotes: Type dispatch is central — port as a typed modal component. html opens new tab (not in-modal). Text types fetch the raw artifact and escape into <pre> (preserve esc()). Image uses object-fit contain via .full class. Title/wide are modal-level state.

entries.name: Overview modal (openOverview) — cross-stage product gallery
entries.where: console.html:2322-2395; opened by topbar '📋全部产物' button (HTML 601)
entries.what: Parallel Promise.all fetches /api/brief, /api/explore, /api/pages; builds per-phase card grids: P1 brief summary text card, P2 refs imgs, P3 hero imgs (★基调 marker if selectedHero), P4 page×platform version imgs, plus each phase's state.json artifacts (img or doc-icon card). Cards open openArtifact on click. docIco() returns inline Lucide SVG per file type (md/html/code/json/mindmap).
entries.portingNotes: Read-only aggregation across 3 endpoints + state.phases. Keep the per-phase grouping and the ★基调 annotation logic (ex.selectedHero===h.file). docIco maps type→SVG path — port as an icon component map.

entries.name: Chat drawer + inbox (keyboard Enter/Shift+Enter, unread badge, sticky scroll)
entries.what: toggleChatDrawer toggles .open on #chat-drawer; opening marks read (chatSeen=lastMsgCount, removes .has-unread). chat-form submit: preventDefault, trim, POST /api/inbox {text}, clear, pollInbox. chat-input keydown: Enter w/o Shift → preventDefault + form.requestSubmit() (Shift+Enter = newline). pollInbox renders messages (special bodies for type canvas-feedback / preview-feedback), preserves scroll stickiness (within 30px of bottom → autoscroll), and toggles #chat-btn .has-unread when new msgs arrive while drawer closed.
entries.portingNotes: Enter-to-send / Shift+Enter-newline is standard but uses form.requestSubmit() — replicate with onKeyDown checking e.key==='Enter'&&!e.shiftKey. Sticky-scroll: capture scroll position BEFORE re-render, restore after (scrollTop+clientHeight>=scrollHeight-30). Unread tracking is two counters (lastMsgCount vs chatSeen) — model in state. Message body has 3 render variants by m.type; canvas-feedback shows ❤count/comment count even though canvas no longer emits likes (legacy inbox messages still rendered).

entries.name: Agent choices浮条 (待确认问题) — option click & free-text reply
entries.what: Polls /api/choices (3s), filters unanswered (answer==null) into #choices-bar (fixed bar top-center, .show). Each choice: question + option chips (.copt data-cid/data-opt) + free-text input + reply button. Click delegation on bar: .copt → answerChoice(cid,opt). answerChoice optimistically removes from pChoices, re-renders, POST /api/choice {id,answer}, toast. answerChoiceInput reads #ci-<id>. renderChoices bails if an INPUT in the bar is focused (avoid interrupting typing).
entries.portingNotes: Optimistic removal + POST. The 'don't re-render while my input is focused' guard (line 1052-1053) prevents poll from wiping in-progress typing — in React, either keep input as uncontrolled or skip reconcile while focused, or use a stable keyed list so React preserves the focused input. Stage-tagged choices (c.stage). Endpoints /api/choices (GET), /api/choice (POST).

entries.name: New-project modal: platform multi-select, primary radio, priority drag-reorder + localStorage draft
entries.what: nm state object; NM_DRAFT_KEY='pf-new-project-draft' in localStorage. openNewModal loads draft (loadNmDraft with field backfill) or freshNm(); toast if restored. Every input/click saves draft (saveNmDraft). Delegation IIFE on #new-body: .wz-pcard click toggles platform (re-picks primary if disabled); .wz-pr click sets primary; input on #nm-name auto-derives slug (autoSlug, fb fallback for CJK) unless slugEdited; #nm-slug input sets slugEdited. HTML5 drag-and-drop on .wz-prio-item (dragstart/dragend/dragover) reorders nm.priority array (splice). createProject sorts primary first, POST /api/create, on {id} clearNmDraft + navigate /p/<id>/.
entries.portingNotes: Draft persistence: every keystroke/toggle writes localStorage; cleared only on successful create. Port with a useEffect syncing nm→localStorage and a load-on-open. autoSlug + CJK fallback (fb random) logic must stay (Chinese names yield empty slug→placeholder). Priority drag uses native HTML5 DnD (draggable + dragover preventDefault + array splice) — can keep native DnD or a lib, but the splice-reorder semantics (remove dragK, insert before target) must match. slugEdited flag stops auto-derive once user types slug. Primary auto-reselect when its platform is deselected.

entries.name: Delete-project modal (two-tier: remove vs hard-delete with name-confirm)
entries.what: openDelete(id) sets delTarget {id,name,dir}, renders modal with two actions. removeProject → POST /api/project-remove {id} (keeps disk). Hard delete: input oninput=syncDelConfirm enables #del-hard-btn only when typed value===project name (also turns btn red); hardDeleteProject re-checks name match then POST /api/project-delete {id}, toast result, pollProjects.
entries.portingNotes: Type-to-confirm gating (value===name enables destructive button + color change) is a safety pattern — replicate with controlled input + disabled state. Two endpoints: /api/project-remove (soft), /api/project-delete (hard). Re-validates name on click too (defense).

entries.name: Sidebar collapse toggle + collapsed-logo expand
entries.what: toggleSidebar toggles body.collapsed (CSS animates #sidebar 232↔64px, hides labels/name/account meta). Collapse button (.sb-collapse) visible only on sidebar hover, hidden when collapsed. sbLogoClick: when collapsed, clicking logo prevents default nav and expands instead (logo doubles as expand affordance); when expanded, lets <a href='/'> navigate home.
entries.portingNotes: State is a body class — in React use a top-level boolean (context/state) and conditional class on the layout root, not document.body (or keep body class if layout is outside React root). sbLogoClick's conditional preventDefault (collapsed→expand, else navigate) needs the collapsed state at click time.

entries.name: relTime formatting + toast system
entries.what: toast(msg): sets #toast text, adds .show, clears prior timer, auto-hides after 2200ms. hideToast clears immediately (called on stage switch to clear stale toasts, selectStage 1085). relTime(s): parses 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS' (space→T), returns 刚刚 / N分钟前 / N小时前 / N天前 / raw if unparseable.
entries.portingNotes: toast is a global singleton with a single timer — port as a context/provider with one active toast + timeout ref; hideToast must be callable from elsewhere (stage switches clear it). relTime: replace(' ','T') is needed for Safari Date parsing of the server timestamp format — keep it; NaN guard returns the raw string.

entries.name: Stepper + stage routing (selectStage, URL hash #sN, board vs canvas swap)
entries.where: console.html:1026-1098 (CANVAS_STAGES=[3,4], selectStage, nextStage); renderBoard stepper 1178-1194; hashchange 2427-2430
